title: rubus deseglisei
intro: Rubus deseglisei, a species of wild raspberry native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus deseglisei include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and also used in jams, jellies, and other food products.
